query: Kincaid Classic cross country ski race Kincaid Park

videos.title: Cross Country Ski Race at Kincaid Park
videos.description: As a Tour Guide, I spend my summers escorting groups around Alaska, but what happens in the winter? So much! Cross Country skiing is a big deal up here in Alaska. My family skis and sometime they even race. Today was a race day. Get a bird's eye view of the race scene and starting area in progress.
videos.transcript:
hi everybody this is lin again with my
alaska guide and sometimes as a guide
people say what do you do in the winter
well i do a lot of different things but
one of the things that i do is spend a
lot of time here at kinkade park
watching the ski races now there's lots
of cup braces there's the anchorage cup
and the best cup but my kids have gone
through the anchorage school system and
raced in their junior high and high
school years so today is one of my last
races with a skier in a high school race
um joey is racing today and tomorrow is
another day for this particular race
series and then there's one more race
for him so um though it might be my last
race with the high school with a student
in it it is not my last rodeo as my
husband and my older kiddo continue to
race in the recreational races so i'll
give you a glimpse of what it looks like
down there and i hope to see you around
kincaid sometime come down in the winter
on any weekend practically there's some
kind of race going on here

videos.title: Skiing at Kincaid
videos.description: Ian took this video of my skate skiing while 4.5 months pregnant at Kincaid Park on a beautiful foggy day.

videos.title: Kincaid park
videos.description: Kincaid Park is a 1,516 acre park in the city of Anchorage. The park has ski trails, bike trails, and hiking trails open to the public to enjoy. Kincaid park has been a great place to go and get outside and get excise after work in the evenings. What a great place to ski!

videos.title: Skiing Kincaid Park Ski Trails Anchorage Alaska
videos.description: Me throwing down some classic skiing in Kincaid Park, Anchorage Alaska on12-28-2013. Music by "The Browning" "Cross the Line" download the album "Hypernova" on iTunes today!

videos.title: Track setting cross country ski trail with classic loppet 60
videos.transcript:
Here
we have it. Cross country ski grooming
classic style. I got the Altera 700 with
the Tiger Tracks and plow on. And uh
yesterday I did a couple of pre
preliminary
grooming sessions. I flattened the
trail. Uh we haven't really gotten any
snow this year. So I had to do a full
prep yesterday and then it snowed
another 5 cm last night. So I did my
initial track set yesterday and as you
can see it snowed another 5 cm and I
wasn't quite able to collect
as much snow with my groomer as I wanted
to. So we do have some place where the
track is very shallow. But with that 5
centimeters that we got last night,
look at this.
Look at that. Cross country skis. Cuz
cross country skis are nicknamed misery
sticks for a reason. But uh yeah, we can
see here.
Getting a nice classic track set.
It's midfebruary now. Working with very
marginal snow driving the boat. It's way
better.
Look at that track.
This is being made by somebody who knows
what he's doing.
What a beautiful trail system. What
again?
